languages.title: Language
languages.subtitle: Choose the language used throughout the app.

phone.label: Phone number
phone.searchCountry: Search country, code, or dialing prefix
phone.tooShort: This phone number is too short.
phone.tooLong: This phone number is too long.
phone.invalid: Enter a valid phone number for the selected country.

auth.onboardingTagline: A personal safety companion for the moments between “I’m fine” and “I need help.”
auth.createSubtitle: Choose a sign-in method to protect your safety graph.
auth.signInFailedMessage: We could not complete sign-in. Check your connection and try again.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Using a local development session. Native Google Sign-In works in a development build.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Pair now or continue and add it later.
auth.northStarBody: The VL01 wearable can trigger safety flows with taps and long press gestures.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Your gentle safety companion on the map and in calls.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear can help with home mode, guardian mode, emergency mode, excuse calls, and voice support.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Used for the map, danger zones, safe arrival, and SOS context.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving asks for location so guardians can understand where help may be needed. You can change this later in Settings.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Notifications support check-ins and emergency events.
permissions.notificationsBody: We only use notifications for safety prompts, emergency updates, and reminders you enable.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses your location for the safety map, danger zones, quick share, and SOS context. You can change this later in Settings.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving sends check-in reminders, emergency updates, and safety prompts you enable. We do not use notifications for ads.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses your microphone only when you start an AI companion or safety call.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses Bluetooth to pair with NorthStar jewelry, read connection status, and trigger safety flows from the wearable.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses the camera only when you choose to take a profile photo or share a safety image.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving keeps this flow available from Settings and the dashboard.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Pick the companion voice that feels safest to hear.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Five taps can escalate to SOS and guardian alerts.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Create a graceful reason to leave an uncomfortable situation.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Start a real-time companion call when you need support.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Try the safety flows in a low-pressure demo.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Keep the jewelry nearby while scanning.
jewelry.noDevices: No nearby NorthStar devices found yet.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth scanning could not start. Please try again.
jewelry.scanFailed: We could not find nearby jewelry. Check Bluetooth, keep NorthStar close, and try again.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth scanning could not start. Check Bluetooth access and try again.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Nearby-device access is off. Allow Bluetooth access in Settings, then try again.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar took too long to connect. Move it closer and try again.
jewelry.connectFailed: We could not connect to NorthStar. Check that it is charged and nearby, then try again.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Keep NorthStar charged and close to this phone, then scan again.

home.subtitle: Safety companion dashboard
home.readyBody: Voice, map, jewelry, and guardians are one tap away.

map.title: Safety map
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go preview; Mapbox renders in a development build.
map.updateFailed: We could not update your location. Please try again.
map.notRequested: Location access was not requested. You can enable it later from Settings.
map.permissionOff: Location access is off. Enable it in Settings to center the safety map on you.
map.timeout: Your location is taking longer than expected. Move somewhere with a clearer signal and try again.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Trusted places you save will appear here for quick access.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Connecting securely to your voice companion...
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Start the call or type a message when you are ready.

history.clearMessage: This removes saved AI companion messages from this device.
history.title: Conversation history
history.subtitle: AI companion messages saved on this device.
history.emptyMessage: Your AI companion conversations will appear here after your first call.
history.loadFailed: We could not load conversation history. Please try again.
history.clearFailed: We could not clear conversation history. Please try again.
history.deleteFailed: We could not delete that conversation. Please try again.

voices.title: My safety call voices
voices.subtitle: Choose the companion voice that feels right to hear.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Please try choosing the voice again.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: This voice sample could not be played. Please try again.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Use bundled companion responses when the network or Hume credentials are unavailable.
settings.privacyBody: Export or delete the local data stored on this device.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Unable to export your data right now.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: This removes your profile, settings, emergency contacts, conversation history, permission reminders, and local auth session from this device.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Unable to delete local data right now.
settings.updateFailedMessage: We could not save that preference. Please try again.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Your session is still active. Please try again.

contacts.title: Emergency contacts
contacts.subtitle: Trusted people available during safety flows.
contacts.name: Name
contacts.emptyMessage: Add someone you trust so they are ready when a safety flow needs them.
contacts.removeMessage: This person will no longer appear in your emergency flow.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: We could not save this contact. Check the details and try again.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: We could not remove this contact. Please try again.

friends.title: Friends
friends.subtitle: Guardians, requests, and emergency graph.
friends.emptyMessage: Trusted friends and guardians will appear here once they are added.

emergency.title: Emergency SOS
emergency.subtitle: Escalate only when you need immediate support.
emergency.body: This will notify your safety flow and prepare emergency contacts.
emergency.addContact: Add an emergency contact in Settings.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Location sharing stub is ready. Connect the backend share endpoint to send live links.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tap
capybearTap.subtitle: Double-tap your NorthStar to drop a safety orange.
capybearTap.body: Gesture route is ready for BLE event wiring.

errors.voiceOffline: You seem offline. Your message will be sent when you reconnect.
errors.voiceQueued: Message saved. It will be sent when the voice companion reconnects.
errors.voiceRetrying: Trying to send your message again...
errors.voiceConnecting: Connecting securely to your voice companion...
errors.microphone: Microphone access is needed for voice calls. You can enable it in Settings, or type a message instead.
errors.billing: The online voice companion is temporarily unavailable. You can continue with the offline companion.
errors.authentication: The voice companion could not verify this session. Sign in again or use the offline companion for now.
errors.timeout: The voice companion took too long to respond. Check your connection and try again.
errors.network: We could not reach the voice companion. Check your connection, then try again or continue offline.
errors.genericVoice: Something interrupted the voice call. Try again, or continue with the offline companion.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving needs microphone access for safety and AI companion calls.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses your location for the safety map and nearby safety features.
ios.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: VeryLoving uses your location to support safe-arrival and emergency flows.
ios.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses background location for safe-arrival and nearby danger-zone features.
ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses the camera only when you choose to take a profile or safety photo.
ios.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses your photo library only when you choose a profile or safety image.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses Bluetooth to connect to your NorthStar safety jewelry.
ios.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses Bluetooth to connect to your NorthStar safety jewelry.
